# 03_dropout_v2

This is the **static** companion to the interactive Streamlit dashboard.

## Outcome

Children 12-23 months who received DTP1 (h3 ∈ 1-3) AND failed to receive DTP3 (h7 == 0); WHO immunisation cascade dropout

## Pipeline

`descriptive → esda → ml → causal → digital-twin → dashboard → manuscript`
